name: Green Tomato Bread
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Pecans or Walnuts, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core green tomatoes. Discard seeds.
2. Run the cut-up pieces through a blender until smooth and creamy. You should have about 2 cups of pulp.
3. Set raisins to soak in 2/3 cup boiling water; set aside to cool.
4. In a large mixing bowl, cream shortening and sugar until fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Gradually add the tomato pulp, plumped raisins, and soaking water to the shortening mixture, stirring well after each addition.
7. In another bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, cloves, and nuts.
8. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture one cup at a time, stirring well after each addition.
9. Divide the batter evenly between two greased 9 x 5 inch loaf pans.
10. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
